---
title: Dining at DKU
subtitle: 'Whether you eat to live, or live to eat—this guide will get you started on nutrition-**maxxing** at DKU.'
---

## The Community Center Canteen

::: {.callout-tip} 

## Normal Open Hours

| Every day | Time |
|---|---|
| Breakfast | 7:00–9:30 |
| Lunch | 11:00—13:30 |
| Dinner | 17:00—19:30 |

::: 

#### Holiday Schedules

No updates yet.

### Offerings

| Location | What you can find | Examples |
|---|---|---|
| 1F, closest to main stairs | Sandwich Bar | Sandwiches, fruit cups, pastries |
| 2F, closest to main stairs| Western Food | Pasta, pizza, fried chicken, french fries |
| 2F, East-most side | Halal Food | Fried rice, pita bread soup, beef noodle soup |

## Takeout「外卖」

There are several apps for ordering takeout in China. Here are some recommendations for you to get started: 

| Name | Pros | Cons |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 淘宝闪购 (f.k.a 饿了么) | ... | ... |
| 美团 | generous coupons | ... |

### Takeout cabinet locations 

| Location  | Name in Chinese |
|---|---|
| North gate (between UG residence halls #D and #H) | ... |
